channel.title: Kissimmee Planning Advisory Board - Public Notices
channel.description: Public notices for Kissimmee Planning Advisory Board meetings and proceedings

item.title: Miscellaneous Notices - Kissimmee
item.description:
LEGAL ADVERTISEMENT OSCEOLA COUNTY BOARD OF COUNTY COMMISSIONERS PROJECTS: 1) AR-26-15994-NO Ready Mix Concrete
--- Full Notice Text --- LEGAL ADVERTISEMENT OSCEOLA COUNTY BOARD OF COUNTY COMMISSIONERS PROJECTS: 1) AR-26-15994-NO Ready Mix Concrete. There will be no Pre-Proposal Conference for this project. Deadline for Questions: Friday, July 24, 2026, at 2:00 PM Local Time. Due Date: Tuesday, August 18, 2026, at 2:00 PM Local Time. Contact: Nancy Ortiz, 407-742-0940. 2) AR-26-15962-NO Annual Supply of Limerock. There will be no Pre-Proposal Conference for this project. Deadline for Questions: Friday, July 24, 2026, at 2:00 PM Local Time. Due Date: Tuesday, August 18, 2026, at 2:00 PM Local Time. Contact: Nancy Ortiz, 407-742-0940. 3) AR-26-16029-AS Asphalt Resurfacing. There will be no Pre-Proposal Conference for this project. The Solicitation document and any addenda can be accessed and downloaded from Vendorlink at the following web address: Vendorlink.osceola.org. The deadline for questions is Wednesday, August 5, 2026, at 2:00 p.m. local time. Due Date is Tuesday, August 18, 2026, at 2:00 p.m. local time. Contact: Arima Santana (407) 742-0925. FOR MORE INFORMATION, VISIT OSCEOLA COUNTYS VENDORLINK WEB SITE AT http://vendorlink.osceola.org. July 16, 2026

item.title: Miscellaneous Notices - Orlando
item.description:
OSCEOLA COUNTY BOARD OF COUNTY COMMISSIONERS PROJECTS 1
Meeting: Wednesday, August 5, 2026 at 2:00 p.m.
--- Full Notice Text --- OSCEOLA COUNTY BOARD OF COUNTY COMMISSIONERS PROJECTS 1. AR-26-15994-NO Ready Mix Concrete. There will be no Pre-Proposal Conference for this project. Deadline for Questions: Friday, July 24 2026, at 2:00PM Local Time. Due Date: Tuesday, August 18, 2026, at 2:00PM Local Time. Contact: Nancy Ortiz, 407-742-0940. 2. AR-26-15962-NO Annual Supply of Limerock. There will be no Pre-Proposal Conference for this project. Deadline for Questions: Friday, July 24 2026, at 2:00PM Local Time. Due Date: Tuesday, August 18, 2026, at 2:00PM Local Time. Contact: Nancy Ortiz, 407-742-0940. 3. AR-26-16029-AS Asphalt Resurfacing. There will be no Pre-Proposal Conference for this project. The Solicitation document and any addenda can be accessed and downloaded from Vendorlink at the following web address: Vendorlink.osceola.org. The deadline for questions is Wednesday, August 5, 2026 at 2:00 p.m. local time. Due Date is Tuesday, August 18, 2026 at 2:00 p.m. local time. Contact: Arima Santana (407) 742-0925. FOR MORE INFORMATION, VISIT OSCEOLA COUNTYS VENDORLINK WEB SITE AT http://vendorlink.osceola.org. 101639 7/12/2026

item.title: Miscellaneous Notices - Kissimmee
item.description:
LEGAL ADVERTISEMENT OSCEOLA COUNTY BOARD OF COUNTY COMMISSIONERS PROJECTS: 1) AR-26-16034-LA, Aerial Adulticiding and Aerial Larviciding Applicat...
--- Full Notice Text --- LEGAL ADVERTISEMENT OSCEOLA COUNTY BOARD OF COUNTY COMMISSIONERS PROJECTS: 1) AR-26-16034-LA, Aerial Adulticiding and Aerial Larviciding Application Services for Mosquito Control. There will be a virtual non-mandatory pre-bid conference held on Monday, July 13, 2026, at 10:00 AM local time. Dial in at 407-906-2344, and when prompted, enter the following conference code: 724 080 512#. Question period ends: Friday, July 17, 2026, at 4:00 PM Local time. Bid Due date is: Tuesday, August 4, 2026, at 2:00 PM Local time. Contact: Luis Aviles, 407-742-0937. FOR MORE INFORMATION, VISIT OSCEOLA COUNTYS VENDORLINK WEB SITE AT http://vendorlink.osceola.org [http://vendorlink.osceola.org]. July 9, 2026

item.title: Miscellaneous Notices - Orlando
item.description:
OSCEOLA COUNTY BOARD OF COUNTY COMMISSIONERS PROJECTS: 1
Meeting: Monday, July 13, 2026 at 10:00 AM
--- Full Notice Text --- OSCEOLA COUNTY BOARD OF COUNTY COMMISSIONERS PROJECTS: 1. AR-26-16034-LA, Aerial Adulticiding and Aerial Larviciding Application Services for Mosquito Control. There will be a virtual non-mandatory pre-bid conference held on Monday, July 13, 2026 at 10:00 AM local time. Dial in at 407-906-2344, and when prompted, enter the following conference code: 724 080 512#. Question period ends: Friday, July 17, 2026, at 4:00 PM Local time. Bid Due date is: Tuesday, August 4, 2026, at 2:00 PM Local time. Contact: Luis Aviles, 407-742-0937. FOR MORE INFORMATION, VISIT OSCEOLA COUNTYS VENDORLINK WEB SITE AT http://vendorlink.osceola.org. 99450 7/05/2026

item.title: Miscellaneous Notices - Kissimmee
item.description:
LEGAL ADVERTISEMENT OSCEOLA COUNTY BOARD OF COUNTY COMMISSIONERS PROJECTS: 1) ITB-26-15927-PC Ventura Elementary Sidewalk Project Community Deve...
--- Full Notice Text --- LEGAL ADVERTISEMENT OSCEOLA COUNTY BOARD OF COUNTY COMMISSIONERS PROJECTS: 1) ITB-26-15927-PC Ventura Elementary Sidewalk Project Community Development Block Grant Funded - #B-24-UC-12-0020. The solicitation document and any addenda can be accessed and downloaded from VendorLink at the following web address: Vendorlink.osceola.org. A VIRTUAL Non-Mandatory Pre-Bid Conference will be held on Tuesday, June 23, 2026, at 1:00 PM Local Time via the Microsoft TEAMS Application. Dial-in using (407)-906-2344, and when prompted enter the Conference Code: 120 119 455#. Please note the meeting will be audio recorded. The deadline for questions is Wednesday, July 1, 2026, at 2:00 PM Local Time. Due Date: Tuesday, July 14, 2026, at 2:00 PM Local Time. Contact: Paul Callaway (407) -742-0932. 2) PS-26-15955-PC Design Services for the Cypress Parkway Sidewalk Project Funded by Community Development Block Grant (CDBG) #B-25-UC-12-0020. The solicitation document and any addenda can be accessed and downloaded from VendorLink at the following web address: Vendorlink.osceola.org. A VIRTUAL Non-Mandatory Pre-Proposal Conference will be held on Thursday, June 25, 2026, at 11:00 AM Local Time via the Microsoft TEAMS Application. Dial-in using (407) 906-2344, and when prompted enter the Conference Code: 898 316 89#. Please note the meeting will be audio recorded. The deadline for questions is Wednesday, July 1, 2026, at 2:00 PM Local Time. Due Date: Tuesday, July 14, 2026, at 2:00 PM Local Time. Contact: Paul Callaway (407)-742-0932. FOR MORE INFORMATION, VISIT OSCEOLA COUNTYS VENDORLINK WEB SITE AT http://vendorlink.osceola.org. June 18, 2026
